arts.ttl: Why Guardiola's tactics stopped working amid rise of rapid football
arts.sum: BBC Sport analyses why Pep Guardiola's possession-focused tactics have stopped working amid the rise in rapid, direct football.

arts.ttl: Premier League release new VAR statement that impacts Liverpool, Arsenal and the title race
arts.sum: The Premier League has released a statement to clarify a VAR decision that impacted Liverpool and Arsenal's title race

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Liverpool's next five fixtures after huge twist in Premier League title race
arts.sum: Arsenal dropped points in the Premier League title race as they lost to West Ham United and failed to capitalise after Liverpool only drew against Aston Villa earlier in the week

arts.ttl: Merson's DAMNING Arsenal Verdict | 'No way they catch Liverpool with no forwards'
arts.sum: Following Arsenal's loss to West Ham at the Emirates, Paul Merson says that he believes that there is no way the Gunners can catch Liverpool this season with no fit forwards available.

arts.ttl: Paddy Power PAYS OUT on Liverpool to win the Premier League title after Arsenal suffer disastrous defeat to West Ham
arts.sum: Paddy Power have left punters stunned after paying out on Liverpool to win the Premier League, in light of Arsenal's disastrous defeat to West Ham.

arts.ttl: Devastated Paul Merson makes Liverpool admission live on air after Arsenal incident
arts.sum: Liverpool return to Premier League action on Sunday at Manchester City but have been handed a boost by Arsenal on Saturday afternoon

arts.ttl: Real Madrid want “outstanding” Liverpool player along with Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Liverpool players are facing an uncertain future at the end of the season due to their contract situation. The Reds are currently enjoying an impressive season and they are the favourites to win the league. arts.ttl: Club urged to avoid signing Manchester City star – Would be ‘very expensive risk’ they can’t afford
arts.sum: Club Brugge have been urged to avoid trying to sign Kevin de Bruyne from Manchester City this summer as he’s an expensive risk for them. Voetbal Primeur cover comments from analyst Franky van der Elst today on the matter as he continues to discuss De Bruyne this week.
